chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH AT KARACHI SCRA 2058 of 2023 ___________________________________________________________ DATE ORDER WITH SIGNATURE OF JUDGE(S) ___________________________________________________________ 1. For orders on CMA No.650/2023 2. For hearing of main case 3. For orders on CMA No.651/2023 28.01.2026 Mr. Shahnawaz M. Sahito, advocate for the applicant This matter is pending since 2023 without any progress; even notice has not been sought till date. Today learned counsel is present without file and merely seeks time three years later. There appears to be no case to perpetuate clogging the docket. Accordingly, in view of judgment of the Supreme Court in the case of C.I.R. vs. Rafeh Limited reported as PLD 2020 SC 518, this reference is dismissed for non-prosecution. A copy of this order may be sent under the seal of this Court and the signature of the Registrar to the learned Customs Appellate Tribunal, as required per section 196 of the Customs Act, 1969. Judge Judge Amjad
